## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] cargo fmt --all
- [ ] cargo check
- [ ] cargo test
- [ ] cargo build --release

## Performance Impact

If this touches watches/projection/render/logs, include impact notes.

- Hot path changed:
- CPU/memory impact:
- API pressure impact:
- Failure-mode impact (RBAC/auth/network):

## Compatibility and UX

- [ ] keybinding behavior reviewed (k9s compatibility where applicable)
- [ ] command behavior reviewed
- [ ] docs updated for user-visible changes
